business_problem: Casio (China), known for its G-SHOCK watch brand, traditionally relied on experience-based marketing using social attributes alone—an approach unable to keep up with rapidly changing customer behavior and trends. The company needed a data-driven method to identify the most efficient marketing strategy and operate membership assets with agility.
solution_summary: Casio implemented a unified omnichannel data platform to replace experience-based marketing with data-driven decision-making across online and offline retail channels. The solution ingests customer transaction data, bar codes, product attributes, and warehouse inventory from multiple touchpoints into Dataphin's data mid-end layer, creating standardized data indicators across commerce, inventory, and after-sales. Real-time analytics powered by AnalyticDB enable dynamic AIPL population segmentation during peak seasons like Double 11, improving inventory turnover efficiency and reducing stockouts while unifying brand loyalty tagging across the ecosystem.
business_outcome: Casio gained multi-dimensional customer analytics, predicted Double 11 sales by AIPL audience, improved inventory turnover and reduced inventory pressure, identified correct target customers via unified labels, and during Double 11 achieved 1.7M views during the Cloud Conference live broadcast, 3.17M store visits, and 2.97M transactions.
metrics: 1.7 million views during Double 11 Cloud Conference live broadcast
architecture_clues: Dataphin as unified PaaS data platform using OneData/OneID/OneService
AnalyticDB for MySQL as petabyte-scale real-time data warehouse
AIPL audience model used for sales prediction and inventory planning
evidence_quotes: After adopting data mid-end, Casio was able to analyze its customers comprehensively from multiple perspectives.
Dataphin helped Casio to predict sales based on the AIPL population, improve the efficiency of inventory turnover, and reduce inventory pressure.
Casio achieved 1.7 million views during the Double 11 Cloud Conference live broadcast, 3.17 million store visits and 2.97 million transactions were conducted.

solution_components.name: Dataphin
solution_components.role: Unified PaaS data platform consolidating omnichannel assets, standardizing data indicators, and enabling real-time AIPL population analysis

solution_components.name: AnalyticDB for MySQL
solution_components.role: Real-time data warehouse enabling multi-dimensional analysis of sales, inventory turnover, and customer behavior patterns

data_flow: Omnichannel sales/inventory/customer data → Dataphin consolidation → standardized indicators → AnalyticDB analytics → marketing campaigns and inventory optimization
